name: Fork Divergence Tracker
summary: When a project is a fork of an upstream that ships rapidly, build a "symlink + rsync hybrid" tracker so the fork knows when upstream changes AND maintains a…
description: When a project is a fork of an upstream that ships rapidly, build a "symlink + rsync hybrid" tracker so the fork knows when upstream changes AND maintains a curated ledger of its own deviations. Two surfaces: UPSTREAM_TRACKER.md (auto-refreshed live snapshot) + WE_DIFFER_HERE.md (curated narrative). One daily GitHub Action keeps both honest. Triggers on "fork tracking", "shadow upstream", "track fork divergence", "we forked X and want to know when X changes".
author: marvelousempire
